slogan.zh: 开启地理空间智能新纪元
slogan.en: Opening a New Era of Geospatial Intelligence

description.zh: CupGIS 是一个集数据索引、在线工具、技术博客于一体的地理信息系统平台，致力于为用户提供高效、智能的地理空间解决方案。
description.en: CupGIS is a geographic information system platform integrating data indexing, online tools, and technical blogs, dedicated to providing efficient and intelligent geospatial solutions.

subtitle.zh: 海量地理空间数据，一键检索

description.zh: 汇聚全球遥感影像、矢量地图、DEM高程等多源地理数据，提供高效的索引与检索服务。
description.en: Aggregating global remote sensing imagery, vector maps, DEM elevation and other multi-source geographic data, providing efficient indexing and retrieval services.

subtitle.zh: 专业GIS分析工具，即开即用
subtitle.en: Professional GIS analysis tools, ready to use

description.zh: 提供坐标转换、空间分析、地图制图、数据可视化等系列在线工具，无需安装，浏览器即可使用。
description.en: Providing coordinate conversion, spatial analysis, cartography, data visualization and other online tools, no installation required, usable in browser.

subtitle.zh: 分享GIS前沿技术与实践经验
subtitle.en: Sharing cutting-edge GIS technology and practices

description.zh: 涵盖GIS开发教程、空间算法解析、行业应用案例等内容，与开发者共同成长。
description.en: Covering GIS development tutorials, spatial algorithm analysis, industry application cases, growing together with developers.

subtitle.zh: 完整的API文档与开发指南
subtitle.en: Complete API documentation and developer guides

description.zh: 提供详尽的API参考、SDK使用指南、快速入门教程，助力开发者快速集成GIS能力。
description.en: Providing detailed API references, SDK usage guides, quick start tutorials, helping developers quickly integrate GIS capabilities.

subtitle.zh: 加入开发者社区，共建生态
subtitle.en: Join the developer community, build ecosystem together

description.zh: 与全球GIS开发者交流分享，参与开源项目，共同推动地理空间技术发展。
description.en: Communicate and share with global GIS developers, participate in open source projects, jointly promote geospatial technology development.

subtitle.en: Learn about CupGIS mission and vision

description.zh: CupGIS致力于打造开放、共享、智能的地理信息平台，让地理空间技术触手可及。
description.en: CupGIS is dedicated to building an open, shared, intelligent geographic information platform, making geospatial technology accessible.
